content:
守密人你好：
       彌薩格大學校務處將於3月19日19:30進行校內設施修復，更新完成後您將得到通知，重新進入遊戲。對於更新可能給大家帶來的不便，我們會準備一份補給物資以示歉意。祝大家調查順利！ 
  
【補給物資】
在線維護補償：銀芯*50
  
【領取條件】
領取時間截至2025年4月3日23:59。請記得及時前往郵箱領取補給物資哦。  
 
【更新內容】
● 調整了「星辰篇」調查的波次顯示，現在可以透過星辰篇圖標下方的數字了解當前波次進度。
● 修復了「命輪」和「密契」在部分語言中，詳情介面文本重疊的問題。
● 喚醒體「熔燬·朵爾」的動態立繪已調整為與靜態立繪一致。
● 修復了英文版翻譯中，部分密契名字不統一的問題。
● 修復了英文版翻譯中，缺少部分角色「技能描述」的問題。
● 修復了泰語版翻譯中，「典藏館」活動介面，文本顯示不完全的問題。
● 修復了英文版翻譯中，喚醒體「血鏈·希洛」的技能「鮮血鏈條」和「嗜血鏈球」名字重複的問題。
● 優化了越南語版本中的部分翻譯問題。
● 優化了俄語版翻譯中，技能說明遮擋的問題。

V2.1.1.4 Online Maintenance Notice
 
Dear Keeper,
    The Mythag University Administration Office will conduct facility repairs on March 19 at 19:30(UTC+8). You will be notified once the update is complete and can re-enter the game. We apologize for any inconvenience this may cause and will provide a supply package as compensation. Happy investigating!
    
【Supply Package】
Maintenance Compensation: Silver*50
    
【Claim Conditions】
Claim period ends on April 3 2025(UTC+8), at 23:59. Please remember to check your mailbox to claim the supply package.
     
【Update Content】
● Adjusted the wave display for the "Star Chapter" investigation. You can now see the current wave progress through the number below the Star Chapter icon.
● Fixed text overlap issues in the details interface for "Wheel of Destiny" and "Covenant" in some languages.
● The dynamic illustration of the Awaker "Meltdown Doll" has been adjusted to match the static illustration.
● Fixed inconsistencies in some Covenant names in the English translation.
● Fixed missing "Skill Descriptions" for some characters in the English translation.
● Fixed incomplete text display in the "Archive" event interface in the Thai translation.
● Fixed duplicate names for the skills "Blood Chain" and "Bloodthirsty Chain Ball" of the Awaker "Helot-Catena" in the English translation.
● Optimized translation issues in the Vietnamese version.
● Optimized skill description blocking issues in the Russian translation.
發家致富全靠修復翻譯問題了<:wish:1236951537788649492>
我希望克萊門汀是一個反擊特化~~~
🔥可正常使用！【翻译器】介绍及使用教程！Channel 【Translator function】introduction and usage tutorial！
